value: Database seed for an EMT/AEMT/Paramedic study app with tutorials, scenarios, questions, AI practice mode, media manifest, and Replit Agent ingestion support.
This is a structured v1 database with broad starter content. It is designed to be expanded in chunks. It is not a substitute for local protocol, medical direction, or certified EMS instruction.
All practice questions are original NREMT-style study items. Do not upload memorized/copyrighted NREMT exam questions.
National core content is separated from local override content. Add your county/agency protocols to protocol_overrides.
